author: mmusich
body:
This is a quick follow-up to https://github.com/cms-sw/cms-bot/pull/2761. 
Extends the HLT Phase-2 timing PR test with these additions:

- CPU memory profile comparisons for the HLT menu, HLT-on-CPU, and NGT Scouting menus (previously only GPU comparisons were run), with the resulting PNGs copied to the upload directory.
- An `index.html` summary page generated at the end of the job, showing all comparison plots in a card layout with per-menu status indicators, links to the timing chart, log, and Jenkins build, and an optional CSV section for CMSSW  17.
title: `run-pr-hlt-p2-timing`: add CPU memory comparisons and HTML summary page
